verbGlossary.LOGS AT: {source}-based item (observation, punch item, daily log) is first recorded at {target}, initiating tracking for that location.
verbGlossary.DEMOBILIZES AT: {source} reaches this terminal {target} when all work and inspections are complete, clearing the site for closeout.
verbGlossary.ACTIVATES DURING: {source} becomes an active work area when its associated tasks or inspections enter this in-progress {target}.
verbGlossary.INSPECTED VIA: {source} undergoes field inspection through this inspect-and-{target} pattern, producing conforming or deficient results.
verbGlossary.PASSES AT: {source} or its inspected elements satisfy requirements and receive this conforming disposition {target}.
verbGlossary.FLAGGED AT: {source} is marked with a deficiency or quality issue at this disposition {target}, requiring corrective action before closeout.
verbGlossary.STAGED FOR: {source} completed work is queued at {target}, awaiting superintendent or inspector walkthrough.
verbGlossary.SUSPENDED AT: Work at {target} is paused at this hold status due to unforeseen conditions such as groundwater, contamination, or structural concerns.
verbGlossary.RELEASED INTO: {source} zone is cleared for trade crews to begin work when the preceding phase reaches this in-progress {target}.
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED VIA: Responsibility for {target}'s open items is routed to a specific party through this ball-in-court assignment mechanism.
verbGlossary.SIGNED OFF AT: {source} punch list or inspection items are formally accepted and {target} reaches this closed status.
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source} unresolved items automatically transition to this overdue {target} when deadlines are missed.
verbGlossary.ROUTES THROUGH: {source} commissioning or acceptance package passes through this sequential {target} before sign-off.
verbGlossary.ACCEPTED AT: {source} zone is formally accepted by the owner or commissioning agent when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.RETURNED TO: {source} inspection submission is sent back to this revise-and-resubmit {target} after failing field review.
verbGlossary.FOLLOWS: {source} equipment or system startup adheres to this submit-and-approve {target} pattern.
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source} scheduled activity is constrained by this due-date {target} component tied to trade sequencing.
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source}-based metric is quantified using {target} performance measure.
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source}-based metric is monitored over time using {target} KPI.
